themes.theme: Broad USD weakness ahead of FOMC amid Fed leadership uncertainty and US-Iran peace hopes
US-Iran nuclear talk stall drives oil toward $100, pressuring oil importers (INR) and boosting commodity FX (AUD, CAD)
Critical central bank week: BoJ hike signal, hawkish BoE repricing, cautious ECB – policy divergence in focus
JPY strengthening on BoJ June rate hike expectations vs dovish Fed backdrop

key_observation: The Iran Strait of Hormuz reopening proposal is creating a two-way whipsaw: oil prices remain elevated on stalled talks keeping energy importers under pressure, yet the mere prospect of a deal is simultaneously undermining the USD safe-haven bid via risk-on commodity FX channels.
watch: FOMC decision mid-week: with DXY already below the 98.50/38.2% Fibo and Fed leadership uncertainty in play, any dovish hold could accelerate the USD breakdown toward the 97 handle.
